source: WV DEP — Office of Oil & Gas (abandoned wells)
scope: wells with wellstatus 'Abandoned Well'; orphan = no known operator (state's to plug)
disclaimer: Not every abandoned well leaks, and locations are as WV DEP records them. 'Orphan' means no responsible operator — the state is responsible for plugging it. H2S/gas risk is highest for wells near homes.
